option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
version: '3.9'
services: # ─── PostgreSQL ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── postgres: image: postgres:16-alpine container_name: eventos_postgres environment: POSTGRES_DB: eventosdb POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: eventos2024 ports: - "5432:5432" volumes: - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 5
# ─── Backend (Spring Boot) ────────────────────────────────────────────────── # Descomenta esto cuando tengas el JAR listo para producción # backend: # image: eclipse-temurin:17-jre # container_name: eventos_backend # depends_on: # postgres: # condition: service_healthy # environment: # SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE: prod # DB_URL: jdbc:postgresql://postgres:5432/eventosdb # DB_USER: postgres # DB_PASSWORD: eventos2024 # ADMIN_PASSWORD: cambiar_en_produccion # APP_BASE_URL: https://tu-dominio.com # ports: # - "8080:8080" # volumes: # - ./target/eventos-1.0.0.jar:/app/app.jar # command: java -jar /app/app.jar
volumes: postgres_data:

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
version: '3.9'
services: # ─── PostgreSQL ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── postgres: image: postgres:16-alpine container_name: eventos_postgres environment: POSTGRES_DB: eventosdb POSTGRES_USER: postgres POSTGRES_PASSWORD: eventos2024 ports: - "5432:5432" volumes: - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"] interval: 10s timeout: 5s retries: 5
# ─── Backend (Spring Boot) ────────────────────────────────────────────────── # Descomenta esto cuando tengas el JAR listo para producción # backend: # image: eclipse-temurin:17-jre # container_name: eventos_backend # depends_on: # postgres: # condition: service_healthy # environment: # SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE: prod # DB_URL: jdbc:postgresql://postgres:5432/eventosdb # DB_USER: postgres # DB_PASSWORD: eventos2024 # ADMIN_PASSWORD: cambiar_en_produccion # APP_BASE_URL: https://tu-dominio.com # ports: # - "8080:8080" # volumes: # - ./target/eventos-1.0.0.jar:/app/app.jar # command: java -jar /app/app.jar
# ─── pgAdmin (interfaz gráfica para PostgreSQL) ──────────────────────────── pgadmin: image: dpage/pgadmin4:latest container_name: eventos_pgadmin environment: PGADMIN_DEFAULT_EMAIL: admin@salon.com PGADMIN_DEFAULT_PASSWORD: admin123 ports: - "5050:80" depends_on: - postgres volumes: - pgadmin_data:/var/lib/pgadmin
volumes: postgres_data: pgadmin_data:

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# ========================================= # SALON DE CELEBRACIONES - Configuracion # =========================================
server.port=8080
# ---- Base de Datos PostgreSQL (Docker) ---- spring.datasource.url=jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/eventosdb spring.datasource.username=postgres spring.datasource.password=eventos2024 spring.datasource.driver-class-name=org.postgresql.Driver spring.jpa.database-platform=org.hibernate.dialect.PostgreSQLDialect spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=update spring.jpa.show-sql=false
# ---- Flyway - migraciones automaticas ---- spring.flyway.enabled=true spring.flyway.baseline-on-migrate=true spring.flyway.locations=classpath:db/migration
# ---- H2 Console (desactivada) ---- spring.h2.console.enabled=false
app.jwt.secret=salon-celebraciones-jwt-secret-key-2024-very-secure-and-long app.jwt.expiration=604800000
spring.mail.host=smtp.gmail.com spring.mail.port=587 spring.mail.username=noreply@tucorreo.com spring.mail.password=tupassword spring.mail.properties.mail.smtp.auth=true spring.mail.properties.mail.smtp.starttls.enable=true spring.mail.test-connection=false
twilio.account.sid= twilio.auth.token= twilio.from.phone=+14155552671 twilio.from.whatsapp=whatsapp:+14155238886
app.base-url=http://localhost:5173 app.admin-password=admin123
app.cors.allowed-origins=http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:5174
logging.level.com.salon.eventos=INFO logging.level.org.springframework.security=WARN

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# ========================================= # SALON DE CELEBRACIONES - Configuracion # =========================================
server.port=8080
# ---- Base de Datos PostgreSQL (Docker) ---- spring.datasource.url=jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/eventosdb spring.datasource.username=postgres spring.datasource.password=eventos2024 spring.datasource.driver-class-name=org.postgresql.Driver spring.jpa.database-platform=org.hibernate.dialect.PostgreSQLDialect spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=update spring.jpa.show-sql=false
# ---- Flyway - migraciones automaticas ---- spring.flyway.enabled=true spring.flyway.baseline-on-migrate=true spring.flyway.baseline-version=0 spring.flyway.locations=classpath:db/migration
# ---- H2 Console (desactivada) ---- spring.h2.console.enabled=false
app.jwt.secret=salon-celebraciones-jwt-secret-key-2024-very-secure-and-long app.jwt.expiration=604800000
spring.mail.host=smtp.gmail.com spring.mail.port=587 spring.mail.username=noreply@tucorreo.com spring.mail.password=tupassword spring.mail.properties.mail.smtp.auth=true spring.mail.properties.mail.smtp.starttls.enable=true spring.mail.test-connection=false
twilio.account.sid= twilio.auth.token= twilio.from.phone=+14155552671 twilio.from.whatsapp=whatsapp:+14155238886
app.base-url=http://localhost:5173 app.admin-password=admin123
app.cors.allowed-origins=http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:5174
logging.level.com.salon.eventos=INFO logging.level.org.springframework.security=WARN
